error_message: Ama Frimpong is We Are CASA chief of services (per Maryland Matters 2026-04-18). Not a primary candidate on the listener ballot; not in registry. Noise event-mention.
drain_decision: No dossier written. The processor should filter dossier briefs by membership in data/candidate_series.json before queuing — same recurring noise pattern as 2026-05-22's batch (all marked .error.json with the same rationale).
windows_side_followup: Fix the dossier emitter to gate on candidate_series.json registry membership. Until that ships, every drain wastes time rejecting the same Harford / Baltimore / federal noise.
